content: Brazilian legal-tech WhatsApp tools (JusLead, Projuris ADV, SabioAdv, ChatJuridico, LexAI, Lead Juridico/Voga): dominant pattern is AI chatbot on official Meta WhatsApp API doing 24/7 triage, lead qualification, scheduling, fee proposals; heavily marketed as OAB- and LGPD-compliant. None found doing human-in-the-loop copilot/suggestion + post-conversation diagnostics like this project — space is bot-first, not coach-first. OAB Provimento 205/2021: lawyers may use WhatsApp for informative content, but active solicitation via direct messages offering services (captacao) is prohibited; no promise of results; discretion/moderation required. Tools must avoid enabling captacao and avoid promising outcomes; responding to inbound leads is fine.
